name: anka-actions
description: Monorepo of Anka Build Cloud GitHub Actions (up, down) and their shared library (common)
author: Veertu Inc.

comments.overrides: Security pins for transitive deps that have no patched release in the range our direct deps request. undici: only reached via @actions/core's unused OIDC client, pinned above the <=6.23.0 advisories. js-yaml: forces the 3.x used by jest's istanbul tooling up to a patched 4.x (load-nyc-config uses .load(), which exists in v4).
